scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item dist -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path public\screener_result.csv) { Remove-Item public\screener_result.csv -Force }; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter *.log -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue"
